name: Get That API
description: Developed a Chrome extension using React and Axios that allows developers to test API endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE) with authentication and payload support, improving testing speed and reducing reliance on external tools.

name: Placement Notice Generator
description: Built a web app using React and TypeScript to generate formatted placement notices, with support for WhatsApp and Telegram-ready text. Deployed on Vercel, reducing manual effort for coordinators and streamlining communication.

name: Live Bidding System
description: Created a real-time auction platform where sellers can list items and buyers place live bids, leveraging Firebase for real-time data sync. Improved auction transparency and engagement by providing instant updates for all participants.

name: Zigbee
description: Developed the official website for Zigbee Student Developers' Club using React and Next.js, with a modern TailwindCSS UI. Improved online presence and engagement by providing event updates, resources, and membership details to students.
